NDR.note: Selective equity exposure; duration caution amid elevated yields

BlackRock.note: Risk-on tilt; prefers US equities, short-to-mid duration bonds

BCA.note: Defensive posture; elevated cash buffer; overweight govts vs credit

assets.name: U.S. Equities
assets.note: NDR & BlackRock bullish on US cyclical recovery; BCA flagging valuation risk

assets.name: International Equities
assets.note: BCA sees relative value vs US on valuation; NDR/BL cautious on EUR growth

assets.name: U.S. Large-Cap

assets.name: U.S. Small-Cap
assets.note: Rate sensitivity and weaker balance sheets keep small-cap consensus bearish

assets.note: Secular AI tailwind; NDR and BlackRock prefer growth over value this cycle

assets.name: U.S. Value

assets.note: Dollar strength and China headwinds weigh on EM; NDR & BCA underweight

assets.name: Govt Bonds (U.S.)
assets.note: BCA most bullish on Treasuries as recession hedge; BlackRock prefers short end

assets.name: International Debt
assets.note: Currency risk and ECB/BOJ policy divergence keep most firms cautious

assets.name: Investment Grade (IG) Credit
assets.note: BlackRock sees tight spreads sustained by strong corporate balance sheets

assets.name: High Yield Bonds

assets.name: Emerging Markets Bonds
assets.note: Dollar-denominated EM debt strained by elevated US rates and EM volatility

assets.name: Gold
